## Atlas Manufacturing KPI Lineage Workspace

This subject workspace contains synthetic KPI and operating source extracts for a margin review.
Use BrainDS to map how finance, billing, product, and support records support leadership KPIs.

### Visible sources

| Source | Business meaning |
|---|---|
| `kpi_targets.csv` | KPI names, definitions, targets, owners, and review cadence |
| `finance_ledger.csv` | Revenue, cost, margin, and close-period values |
| `billing_events.csv` | Invoice, credit, renewal, and payment timing events |
| `product_usage.csv` | Usage units and adoption signals that explain margin variance |
| `support_cases.csv` | Escalation and defect signals that may affect retention KPIs |
